name: E2E pipeline: an architecture-decision rule scraped from a source is tagged applies_to_prose, routed to the architectural-content bundle, and the whole-tree audit flags an ADR Markdown file that leaves ingress unrestricted — scrape to audit for the prose axis
command:
printf '# ADR Policy

## Restrict ingress
Architecture decision records must not leave ingress unrestricted.
' > p.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source p.md --source-id adr-policy --json > rules.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'Restrict ingress' --prose 'record an architecture decision record rationale for ingress' --json > c.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c.json --json > r.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const c=require(process.cwd()+"/c.json"),r=require(process.cwd()+"/r.json");if(c.applies_to_prose!==true)process.exit(1);if(!r.enforced_by.some(x=>x.bundle==="architectural-content"))process.exit(1)' && mkdir -p doc && printf '# 0001

## Decision

Leave ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0).
' > doc/adr.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root doc 2>d.txt; de=$?; [ "$de" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' d.txt && echo pipeline-prose-url-to-audit 1>&2
